name: Farmers Breakfast
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil unpeeled potatoes for 30 minutes.
2. Rinse under cold water, peel and set aside to cool.
3. Slice the cooled potatoes.
4. In a large frypan, cook bacon until transparent.
5. Add potato slices; cook until lightly browned.
6. Meanwhile, blend eggs with milk and salt in a bowl.
7. Stir in the cubed ham.
8. Cut tomatoes into thin wedges and add to the egg mixture.
9. Pour the egg mixture over the potatoes in the frypan.
10. Cook until the eggs are set.
11. Sprinkle with chopped chives and serve at once.
